form.formComment: Comes here off a 30-day let-up. At the latest run 2nd of 12 at Ashburton on March 12 over 1200m, 0.2 len behind Mis Speaks carrying 58.5kg at $12.10. The start before that struggled in the run home; 5th of 12 at this track on March 4 over 1000m, on a wet track; 6 len behind Mi Bella with 55.5kg at $11.70. Impressed last start. Solid prospects with a similar effort to last time.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 11th of 14 at this track on March 21 over 1200m, 5 len behind Jetstream with 58.5kg at $33.80. Second-up led but faded 2nd of 14 at Ashburton on April 2 over 1400m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Staphanos Queen with 57.5kg at $26.90. Reaching his peak now and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, won favourite; won by 0.8 len at Wingatui March 15 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Taihoro with 58kg at $3. Has upside and can remain unbeaten.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of three months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation fourth of 14 at this track January 14 over 1200m, soft track; 3 len behind Pizarro with 55kg at $40.70. When resuming last campaign eighth of 11 at Riccarton Park Synthetic May 15 over 1200m, 3 len behind Delphillius carrying 53.5kg at $21.20. Can run a bold race.
